title: Debraj Paul — Student Web Developer Personal Portfolio Site

requirements.text: Build a full single-page personal portfolio website for Debraj Paul with a dark blue (#0A1628 / #0D2149) and white color scheme, clean modern typography, fully mobile-responsive layout, and a professional, confident, trustworthy tone throughout.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary background is dark blue, text is white or light gray, accent colors complement the dark blue palette.
Layout is fully responsive and looks polished on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
All sections are accessible via smooth scroll navigation.
Fonts are modern, readable, and consistent across all sections.

requirements.text: Implement a sticky top navigation bar with Debraj Paul's name/logo on the left and anchor links to all 7 sections on the right. On mobile, collapse navigation into a hamburger menu.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation stays fixed at the top on scroll.
Links smoothly scroll to Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Why Choose Me, and Contact sections.
Hamburger menu works correctly on mobile viewports.

requirements.text: Create the Hero section with: headline 'Professional Business Websites in 48 Hours', subheadline 'I help local businesses get more clients with modern, mobile-optimized websites.', two CTA buttons ('Get Free Demo' linking to Contact section and 'Chat on WhatsApp' opening https://wa.me/918730818101), and an urgency line 'Limited Projects Taken Each Month' styled with a badge or highlight.
acceptanceCriteria: Headline is large and prominent.
'Chat on WhatsApp' button opens WhatsApp link in a new tab.
'Get Free Demo' button scrolls to the Contact section.
Urgency line is visually distinct (e.g., badge, pill, or highlighted text).
Hero section has a visually engaging background (gradient, pattern, or hero image).

requirements.text: Create the About Me section with the bio: 'I'm Debraj Paul, a student web developer based in Assam. I help lawyers, gyms, coaching centers and small businesses build affordable, professional websites that generate real client inquiries.' Include a profile photo placeholder and a 'Request Free Demo' CTA button that scrolls to the Contact section.

quotes: I'm Debraj Paul, a student web developer based in Assam

acceptanceCriteria: Bio text is displayed clearly alongside a profile photo or avatar placeholder.
'Request Free Demo' button scrolls to the Contact section.
Section layout is clean with ample whitespace.

requirements.text: Create the Services section displaying 5 icon cards: 'Business Website Design', 'Landing Pages', 'Website Redesign', 'WhatsApp & Call Integration', and 'Basic SEO Setup'. Each card should have a relevant icon, title, and a short one-line description.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 service cards are displayed in a responsive grid.
Each card has an icon (SVG or icon font), title, and brief description.
Cards have a hover effect for interactivity.

requirements.text: Create the Portfolio section with 3 sample project cards: 'Sample Gym Website', 'Sample Lawyer Website', and 'Sample Coaching Website'. Each card should show a placeholder thumbnail image, project title, and a short description. Include a note: 'Demo designs available on request.'
acceptanceCriteria: 3 portfolio cards are displayed in a responsive grid.
Each card has a thumbnail, title, and short description.
The note 'Demo designs available on request.' is displayed below the cards.
Cards have a hover/overlay effect.

requirements.text: Create the Pricing section with 3 tiers: Basic (₹2,500), Standard (₹3,500, labeled 'Most Popular'), and Premium (₹5,000). Each card should list relevant features appropriate to the tier. The Standard card should be visually highlighted as the recommended option. Each card should have a CTA button that links to the Contact/WhatsApp.
acceptanceCriteria: Three pricing cards are displayed side by side (stacked on mobile).
Standard card is visually distinct with a 'Most Popular' badge.
Prices are shown in INR with ₹ symbol.
Each card lists features and has a CTA button.
CTA buttons open the WhatsApp link or scroll to Contact.

requirements.text: Create the 'Why Choose Me' section displaying 5 benefit points: '48 Hour Delivery', 'Affordable Student Pricing', 'Modern Clean Design', 'Direct WhatsApp Support', and 'No Hidden Charges'. Use icons or checkmarks alongside each point.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 benefit points are displayed with icons or checkmark indicators.
Layout is clean and scannable (grid or list).
Section has a visually distinct background to break up page flow.

requirements.text: Create the Contact section with a form containing fields: Name, Phone, Business Type, and Message, plus a submit button. Below the form, display contact details: Call: +918730818101, WhatsApp: +918730818101 (linking to https://wa.me/918730818101), Email: belipaul4567@gmail.com, Location: Assam, India. The form submission should be stored in the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Form has Name, Phone, Business Type (text or dropdown), and Message fields with basic validation.
Form submission stores the inquiry in the backend canister.
Success message is shown after successful submission.
Contact details (phone, WhatsApp, email, location) are displayed below the form.
WhatsApp contact detail links to https://wa.me/918730818101.
Phone number is a clickable tel: link.

requirements.text: Add a sticky floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page section. Clicking it opens https://wa.me/918730818101 in a new tab. The button should use the WhatsApp green color and a WhatsApp icon, with a subtle pulse or tooltip 'Chat with me'.
acceptanceCriteria: Button is fixed at the bottom-right corner and always visible while scrolling.
Clicking opens https://wa.me/918730818101 in a new tab.
Button uses WhatsApp green (#25D366) and a recognizable WhatsApp icon.
Button has a tooltip or label 'Chat with me'.

requirements.text: Add a footer with copyright text '© 2024 Debraj Paul. All rights reserved.' and quick links to all sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer is displayed at the bottom of the page.
Copyright text is present.
Quick-links allow smooth scroll navigation to all sections.

requirements.text: Implement a backend Motoko actor to store contact form submissions with fields: name, phone, businessType, message, and timestamp. Expose a public method to add a new inquiry and an admin query method to retrieve all inquiries.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor stores inquiry records in stable storage.
submitInquiry() method accepts name, phone, businessType, and message and saves them with a timestamp.
getInquiries() query method returns all stored inquiries.
Motoko code compiles without errors.

requirements.text: Generate portfolio thumbnail images for the 3 sample projects — a gym website preview, a lawyer website preview, and a coaching center website preview — and a professional avatar/profile photo placeholder for the About section. Render all generated images from frontend/public/assets/generated.
acceptanceCriteria: Three portfolio thumbnail images are displayed in the Portfolio section cards.
Profile photo placeholder is displayed in the About section.
Images are served from frontend/public/assets/generated.
Images are appropriately sized and do not degrade page load performance.

constraints: Dark blue (#0A1628 / #0D2149) and white color scheme must be used — no other primary color palette.
WhatsApp number +918730818101 and email belipaul4567@gmail.com must appear exactly as provided.
All prices must be displayed in Indian Rupees (₹).
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
All backend logic must reside in the single main Motoko actor.
nonGoals: No real payment processing or e-commerce functionality.
No user authentication or login system.
No analytics dashboard for the site owner.
No automated email sending on form submission.

required: Modern gym website browser mockup screenshot with dark background, bold typography, and energetic orange accents (portfolio-gym.dim_600x400.png)
Professional lawyer/legal services website browser mockup screenshot with dark navy and gold accents, formal serif typography (portfolio-lawyer.dim_600x400.png)
Bright coaching center website browser mockup screenshot with motivational headline, blue and white palette, student imagery (portfolio-coaching.dim_600x400.png)
Friendly professional young male developer avatar illustration with dark blue background, suitable as a profile photo placeholder (avatar-debraj.dim_400x400.png)
